reproduced_on: re-run live end-to-end (not a one-off): originally captured 2026-07-08, reproduced from scratch on a later run via the bypass-role invoke path (see access_note).
access_note: The invoke data plane (InvokeAgentRuntime / CreateAgentRuntime) is blocked when called with federated session credentials (session-policy deny). This run used a fresh in-account IAM role assumed DIRECTLY (bypassing the credential-vending layer), which carries bedrock-agentcore:* — CreateAgentRuntime, GetAgentRuntime, InvokeAgentRuntime, DeleteAgentRuntime all succeeded. See evidence/live_dataplane_gate_diagnosis is superseded; the block was the credential-vending session policy, not a service-side account gate.
